Six modules section.

Key headings: Everything you need.

1. Rate Comparison - saves X% in first quarter
2. Label Generation - one-click and batch
3. Real-Time Tracking - reduces WISMO tickets by X%
4. Returns Management -automated workflows
5. Analytics and Reporting - per-carrier cost breakdowns
6. Compliance and Customs Engine - auto-generated documentation
